title: paeonia atlantica
intro: Paeonia atlantica, also known as the tree peony, is a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China and Tibet. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Paeonia atlantica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health issues.
